summary: Made three surgical seam-polish edits while preserving the chapter's beats, threat line, and voice: tightened a chair/timeline reference, replaced a line that sat too close to a style-bible calibration phrase, and aligned the late-scene TV state more cleanly with the Chapter 13 opening.
edits: Adjusted the Adirondack-chair paragraph so the chair age no longer implies an exact twenty-five-year usage span despite being bought after the 2002 fire.
Rephrased Cliff's dinner-table debt line to avoid near-verbatim overlap with a calibration-only style-bible example while keeping his transactional register intact.
Changed the late great-room TV detail so the football is back on mute before the chapter ends, matching the Chapter 13 opening state more smoothly.
